title: AC3 Bee Hunting: Procedure for creating an orthomosaic with Polycam
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9i1u","text":"This protocol outlines the steps for generating digital orthomosaics using the Polycam web platform. Users upload a captured image dataset (between 20 and 2,000 photos), configure the project settings to \"Raw\" quality and \"Sequential\" processing, and initiate the cloud-based reconstruction. Once processing is complete, the final orthomosaic can be visualized, exported in the desired format, and downloaded for local or cloud storage.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"57ta5","text":"Use clear, high-quality images taken from multiple angles with consistent lighting. Keep the subject centered and avoid blurry, repeated, or obstructed photos. Organize files before uploading them to Polycam, then review the generated model carefully for gaps, distortions, or missing details before exporting or sharing.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"576ck","text":"Polycam may stop processing or limit access when using the free version. Check image quality, upload status, and account limits. For longer processing time or extended use, a paid Polycam account may be required.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Access Polycam through the following link: Poly.cam (see Figure 1).
Log in to your account. If you do not have an account, create one (see Figure 2).
On the main page, click (+ Create) (see Figure 3). .
From the (+ Create) menu, select Create model from images/video (see Figure 4).
Upload the images you captured by selecting Choose from file system (see Figure 5).
Make sure your project meets the following requirements: a minimum of 20 photographs and a maximum of 150 photographs in the free version.
Assign a name to your project in the Name field (see Figure 6).
Below Name and Photogrammetry, select Raw (This option provides the highest-quality version) (see Figure 6).
Then, click the Advanced Settings tab on the right-hand side and select Sequential (see Figure 6).
Wait for the processing to finish (it can take between 30 minutes and 2 hours, depending on your internet connection and image resolution).
Click Export and save the file locally or to the cloud (see Figure 10).
Select the most suitable format for your project (see Figure 10).
creator: Jaime W Abreu-Ramos
